filing_header.title: Filing Header (context only — no filing action)
filing_header.note: Filing type and deadline are carried for the human filer's context; this package does not file, e-file, or set a filing status of record.

narrative.title: SAR Narrative (5W + How)
narrative.who: The primary subject (SUBJ-1, masked), the personal-checking accountholder, and the wire beneficiary A**** Trading LLC (SUBJ-2, masked).
narrative.what: Five sub-threshold cash deposits totaling USD 48,500 followed by two outbound wires totaling USD 438,000 to a single entity beneficiary, aggregating USD 486,500.
narrative.where: Personal-checking account ****3300 at the reporting institution; wires directed to A**** Trading LLC.
narrative.why: The cash deposits are individually below the USD 10,000 CTR threshold and clustered in rapid succession, and the account aggregates deposits then wires the balance out to a single counterparty, consistent with structuring and funnel-account typologies.
narrative.how: Cash was deposited in five amounts between USD 9,500 and USD 9,900 across 22 days, then moved out in two wires within 10 days, leaving a near-zero balance.

entries.fact: Five cash deposits each between USD 9,500 and USD 9,900 within 22 days.
Two outbound wires of USD 218,000 and USD 220,000 to A**** Trading LLC.
No CTR was triggered because each cash deposit was below USD 10,000.
Beneficiary A**** Trading LLC has no prior relationship or expected activity on file.

investigation_rationale.title: Investigation Rationale
investigation_rationale.summary: The transaction-monitoring investigation (TM-CASE-5521) found sub-threshold cash deposits aggregated and wired out to an unrelated entity with no documented business purpose, inconsistent with the accountholder's expected activity. The pattern is consistent with structuring and funnel-account movement of funds.
investigation_rationale.note: Fact-based rationale for why the activity is suspicious; not a conclusion of guilt.

recommendation.title: Recommended Review Path
recommendation.note: Draft is complete and tie-outs reconcile. Recommend SAR quality review and MLRO/BSA compliance approval, after which the authorized human decides whether to file and e-files via BSA E-Filing. Recommendation only — not a file/no-file decision.

approvals.title: Approvals & Sign-off
approvals.note: Draft is queued for quality review and compliance approval; obtaining these sign-offs and the filing decision are the human steps.

sources_citations.title: Sources & Citations
sources_citations.note: Every asserted fact is mapped to an approved source above.

standing_note_limitations.title: Standing Note / Limitations
standing_note_limitations.text: Draft SAR package for compliance quality review and human filing only. This package records fact-based narrative, source citations, tie-outs, and an advisory review path; it makes no suspicion or file/no-file determination, files nothing, e-files nothing, submits nothing to FinCEN, closes or dispositions no case, writes no system of record, adds no speculation beyond the evidence, and has not been sent. Every regulated decision and the filing itself remain with the authorized human (SAR quality reviewer / MLRO / BSA Officer).
